name: bluerock
description: BlueRock for Builders — the builder toolkit for Claude Code.

plugins.name: bluerock
plugins.description: Get to know your Hub, then run a daily operating rhythm: onboarding that learns who you are and how you write, capture, a morning brew that seeds your priorities, a living today list, meeting prep + recap, and a wrap-up that closes the loop.

plugins.name: bluerock-examples
plugins.description: Agent-example teams for BlueRock for Builders. Account Research: point an agent team at a target company and get a sourced dossier — overview, recent signals, and strategic angles in your voice. More examples coming.
